headline: Shares of travel and leisure-related companies are trading lower as spiking energy costs and inflation worries threaten the outlook for disposable income ahead of the summer travel season.
summary: Shares of travel and leisure-related companies are trading lower as spiking energy costs and inflation worries threaten the outlook for disposable income ahead of the summer travel season.

raw.headline: Shares of travel and leisure-related companies are trading lower as spiking energy costs and inflation worries threaten the outlook for disposable income ahead of the summer travel season.

headline: Spotting Winners: Hilton (NYSE:HLT) And Consumer Discretionary - Travel and Vacation Providers Stocks In Q4
summary: As the craze of earnings season draws to a close, here’s a look back at some of the most exciting (and some less so) results from Q4. Today, we are looking at consumer discretionary - travel and vacation providers stocks, starting with Hilton (NYSE:HLT).
